heading: Omitted
label: 861c Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to entitlement to participate in programs and services provided by United States to Indians as result of return to status as Indians, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 95–281, § 492 Stat. 247May 15, 1978
